message:
perf: add #[inline] to region_table, I/O adapters, sync primitives, and stored_task accessors

Sweep 5: Add missing #[inline] annotations to hot-path methods across
6 files. RegionTable had ZERO inline annotations despite being accessed
on every task scheduling operation. Also covers I/O adapter constructors,
Notify/Mutex/RwLock accessors and future factories, and StoredTask/
LocalStoredTask setters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
